title: CivVoxelMap
description: Fork of VoxelMap Updated specifically for CivMC
body:
# CivVoxelMap

This [CivianMod](https://modrinth.com/collection/vfxo29lK) is a 'fork' of [VoxelMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/voxelmap-updated) for [CivMC](https://civmc.net).

## Changes

- CivMC bans Cave Mode outside the Nether so is now disabled by default. Also added a tooltip warning of the feature's illegality.

- CivMC bans reading entity equipment so player and mob helmets no longer appear in radar by default. Also added a tooltip warning of the feature's illegality. (This is moot on 1.21.8 since VoxelMap itself doesn't have the code for it on this version.)

- CivMC bans the reading entity elevation, so the fairplay option "Show Entity Elevation" is now disabled by default. Also added a tooltip warning of the feature's illegality.

- The fairplay option "Hide Sneaking Players" is now disabled by default. Also added a tooltip warning of the feature's illegality.

- Entities on radar are now ordered with the following priority: players > hostiles > other.

- Fixes VoxelMap command errors related to signed command arguments.
